message:
fix(tests): correct analytics-session and useMissionStorage test failures (#9312)

- resetSessionEngagement: also reset accumulatedEngagementMs, engagementStartMs,
  lastInteractionMs, isUserActive so fake-timer tests don't see stale state
- _loadUtmParams: reset utmParams={} on each call to prevent cross-test pollution
- analytics-session.test: mock navigator.plugins/languages/userAgent in
  isAutomatedEnvironment beforeEach (JSDOM defaults trigger automation detection)
- useMissionStorage.test: fix mergeMissions test to use 'running' (completed
  missions are intentionally dropped when absent from reloaded list)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
